Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''human'': print\(''USER:'', str\(obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', ''''\)\)[:500]\) elif obj.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'': content = obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(''ASSISTANT:'', item[''text''][:500]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(''ASSISTANT:'', content[:500]\) except: pass ")
